scripts.supabase:start: export $(grep -v '^#' .env.local | grep '^SUPABASE_' | xargs) && supabase stop 2>/dev/null; supabase start
scripts.db:sync: set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && PGPASSWORD=$SUPABASE_PROD_DB_PASSWORD pg_dump -h db.ssyeychimkqjhzvwucap.supabase.co -U postgres -d postgres --data-only --schema=public --no-privileges --no-owner -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && supabase db reset --local && psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c 'TRUNCATE trip_events, trip_days, trips, allowed_users RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;' && psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && echo 'DB sync complete'
scripts.db:sync-staging: set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && PGPASSWORD=$SUPABASE_PROD_DB_PASSWORD pg_dump -h db.ssyeychimkqjhzvwucap.supabase.co -U postgres -d postgres --data-only --schema=public --no-privileges --no-owner -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && PGPASSWORD=$SUPABASE_STAGING_DB_PASSWORD psql -h db.fowxrnfttrnvogssaqef.supabase.co -U postgres -d postgres -c 'TRUNCATE trip_events, trip_days, trips, allowed_users RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;' && PGPASSWORD=$SUPABASE_STAGING_DB_PASSWORD psql -h db.fowxrnfttrnvogssaqef.supabase.co -U postgres -d postgres -f /tmp/prod_data.sql && echo 'Staging sync complete'
